title: EDUCATIONAL COOPERATIVE LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 15.  EDUCATIONAL COOPERATIVE LAW

§2801.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be referred to by the short title: "Educational Cooperative Law."

Added by Acts 1958, No. 257, §1.
